raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Landing check-in","name":"What’s been most on your mind at work lately, Riley?","description":"Opens with a safe context-setting check-in so Riley can name what feels most salient in week two.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"settling","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Team contact map","name":"Who have you been getting the most live context from so far?","description":"Surfaces whether Riley is building the real team map through direct contact or mostly through docs.","purpose":"topic","stage":"settling","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Ownership edges","name":"Where do the ownership boundaries still feel fuzzy to you?","description":"Checks whether Riley knows where his remit starts and stops before he makes decisions.","purpose":"topic","stage":"orientation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Good call line","name":"What feels like a safe call for you to make on your own right now?","description":"Surfaces how Riley is calibrating autonomy versus escalation in the role.","purpose":"competency","stage":"orientation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Missing context","name":"What are you still waiting to understand before you change an architecture assumption?","description":"Finds the specific context gaps that could lead to wrong technical decisions.","purpose":"competency","stage":"blockers","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Decision risk","name":"Where does the current design feel riskiest to you?","description":"Identifies the spots where incomplete understanding could quietly create rework later.","purpose":"competency","stage":"blockers","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Incident picture","name":"What’s your understanding of how incidents should be handled here?","description":"Checks whether Riley has the practical incident model he needs for a backend role.","purpose":"competency","stage":"blockers","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Escalation path","name":"When would you escalate something rather than keep digging on it yourself?","description":"Tests Riley’s sense of escalation thresholds and communication norms in practice.","purpose":"competency","stage":"blockers","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Support network","name":"Who would you want to pull in first when you need context fast?","description":"Looks for the people and channels that should become Riley’s default support network.","purpose":"topic","stage":"connection","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next support","name":"What would make the next couple of weeks steadier for you?","description":"Closes by turning the check-in into concrete onboarding support and next-step alignment.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"connection","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
